title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Wano Citizens, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...of the rooftop battle has been revised!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys really are something!! I can't believe it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I heard someone say that Daddy knew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they would kill him because he used to be a really really big deal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that he decided to LET himself get caught anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...shall now make his grand final journey!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In order to give this country one last chance!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
